news-global-econ.description: With U.S. marriage rates falling and hookup culture alienating young women, a columnist warns that the anti-marriage movement has real consequences.

news-global-econ.description: The FDA PreCheck Pilot Program aims to slash delays at new domestic pharmaceutical facilities, with seven major companies already breaking ground.

news-global-econ.description: Elayna Black reveals she emailed TNA at age 12 to join The Beautiful People and grew up idolizing Angelina Love, Velvet Sky, and Madison Rayne.

news-global-econ.title: The battle for Congress gets a Wall Street-style scoreboard powered by real-money bets
news-global-econ.description: Kalshi's new Midterms Hub combines live prediction markets with polling, fundraising data and historical results to track House, Senate and governor races.

news-global-soc.description: A report alleges top teachers unions are embedding DEI principles into AI guidance for classrooms through equity and algorithmic bias frameworks.
